g.text: not yet supported (v1 = azure-container-apps only); stop
[topology/security choice ambiguous OR a go-live landmine is statically detectable]
Mandatory blocking pause. The skill NEVER guesses an
ambiguous decision, and NEVER demotes a detected
go-live landmine to a buried runbook STOP note.
Container Apps, ACR, Azure DB for PostgreSQL (TLS),
Key Vault (Deny + bypass=AzureServices when peers private),
location, env/secret; STOP before every state-changing
or go-live step incl. the billing production gate)
never touches the server, DB TLS + at-rest,
Secure-by-default: no store left more network-open
report written files; review the diagram
and run the runbook yourself. Executes NOTHING.
